title: Mirror usage, how to config please
body:
#1634
As this shows, mrrior is supported, but how to config? 

I've searched github and `buildah.io` for docs but got none.

comments.body: Hi @huapox, thanks for reaching out. You can find the documentation how to configure mirroring in the [containers-registries.conf](https://github.com/containers/image/blob/master/docs/containers-registries.conf.5.md) man page.

@vrothberg Thx, And I got this here.
https://github.com/containers/image/pull/617/files#diff-fbfdafdf3fb8cd848f925272125d7c15L70-R128
Would probably be worth a quick blog  as well, to make this information easier to find.
